presence..read: auth != null && query.orderByChild === 'seenAt' && ((query.startAt != null && query.startAt >= now - 120000) || (query.endAt != null && query.endAt <= now - 150000 && query.limitToFirst != null && query.limitToFirst <= 25))

$session..write: auth != null && ($session === auth.uid || (!newData.exists() && data.child('seenAt').isNumber() && data.child('seenAt').val() < now - 150000))
$session..validate: newData.hasChildren(['seenAt']) && newData.numChildren() === 1 && newData.child('seenAt').isNumber() && newData.child('seenAt').val() >= now - 10000 && newData.child('seenAt').val() <= now + 10000
